name: vendor.myndhyve.canvas
description: First vendor-namespace pack. Ships MyndHyve canvas-coordination nodes — canvasRead / canvasWrite / canvasCreate / crossCanvasInvoke — preserving the `core.coordination.*` typeIds in the wild (typeId-preserve strategy from the migration plan §4). The pack itself is MyndHyve-internal: hosts that don't advertise `host.canvas: supported` cannot register it.
author: MyndHyve
